title: REALM: Real-Time Estimates of Assistance for Learned Models in Human-Robot Interaction
title_zh: REALM：人机交互中学习模型的实时辅助估计
abstract: There are a variety of mechanisms (i.e., input types) for real-time human interaction that can facilitate effective human-robot teaming. For example, previous works have shown how teleoperation, corrective, and discrete (i.e., preference over a small number of choices) input can enable robots to complete complex tasks. However, few previous works have looked at combining different methods, and in particular, opportunities for a robot to estimate and elicit the most effective form of assistance given its understanding of a task. In this letter, we propose a method for estimating the value of different human assistance mechanisms based on the action uncertainty of a robot policy. Our key idea is to construct mathematical expressions for the expected post-interaction differential entropy (i.e., uncertainty) of a stochastic robot policy to compare the expected value of different interactions. As each type of human input imposes a different requirement for human involvement, we demonstrate how differential entropy estimates can be combined with a likelihood penalization approach to effectively balance feedback informational needs with the level of required input. We demonstrate evidence of how our approach interfaces with emergent learning models (e.g., a diffusion model) to produce accurate assistance value estimates through both simulation and a robot user study. Our user study results indicate that the proposed approach can enable task completion with minimal human feedback for uncertain robot behaviors.
abstract_zh: 在实时人机交互中，存在多种机制（即输入类型）可以促进有效的人机协作。例如，先前的工作展示了遥操作、纠正性和离散（即对少量选择的偏好）输入如何使机器人完成复杂任务。然而，很少有工作研究不同方法的组合，特别是机器人根据其对任务的理解来估计并引出最有效辅助形式的机会。本文提出了一种基于机器人策略动作不确定性来估计不同人类辅助机制价值的方法。我们的核心思想是构建随机机器人策略的期望交互后微分熵（即不确定性）的数学表达式，以比较不同交互的预期价值。由于每种人类输入类型对人类参与的要求不同，我们展示了如何将微分熵估计与似然惩罚方法相结合，以有效平衡反馈信息需求与所需输入水平。我们通过仿真和机器人用户研究证明了我们的方法如何与新兴学习模型（例如扩散模型）接口，以产生准确的辅助价值估计。用户研究结果表明，所提出的方法能够在不确定的机器人行为下以最少的人类反馈实现任务完成。
tldr_zh: 提出通过微分熵估计不同人类辅助价值的方法，以最少反馈完成机器人任务。
cover_zh: 机器人也能读懂你的心？｜新方法用最少反馈搞定复杂任务
